description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a classic pear-like shape, featuring a slightly tapered top and a broader, rounded base. Its skin is a vibrant, medium to dark green with numerous small, lighter green speckles and a slightly bumpy, textured surface. The top of the avocado displays a small, circular stem scar, while the rest of the skin is mostly unbroken except for a few minor blemishes and dark spots. The surface appears semi-glossy, reflecting some light but not highly polished. The avocado is uncut, with no visible interior, and its size and proportions are consistent with a typical supermarket avocado. It is presented isolated against a plain white background, with no other objects or context visible.
description: A whole, medium-dark green Hass avocado with a speckled, slightly bumpy skin and a small stem scar at the top, shown isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broadest part of the avocado, with a smooth, uninterrupted green surface and subtle speckling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle taper towards the top and a slightly more uniform green coloration.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the stem scar at the top and more pronounced speckling and minor blemishes.
description_view_3: Angled view with the stem scar visible, showing a mix of lighter and darker green spots and a slightly glossier surface.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and small scars
